name: cammoss-basketball-league
description: Cam Moss Summer Basketball League Management Platform

scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd client && npm install
scripts.test: npm run test:client && npm run test:server
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && echo 'Setup complete! Copy client/.env.example to client/.env and configure your environment variables.'
